segments.text: We saw some responses to Monkey Flip here, and Mild looked ready to take momentum in this exchange... but the banana sided with Nao!
segments.original_text: ここはモンキーフリップに対しての回答をいくつか見せてマイルド側がここで展開を一気に取っていくかと思われたんですけれどもバナナがナオちゃんの味方をしました

full_text: We saw some responses to Monkey Flip here, and Mild looked ready to take momentum in this exchange... but the banana sided with Nao!
